personality_one_liner: A fast, predatory, command-center interface built for deal-flippers to instantly spot and strike on high-margin opportunities.

spacing.rule: Use stacked modules, segmented controls, sticky filters, and exposed system states. Avoid soft spacing; layout must feel athletic, durable, and structurally clear.

do's: Use tonal separation (surfaceSecondary) instead of glass on dense data screens.
dont's: Do not use blur or glassmorphism. This personality requires sharp, responsive, tactical interfaces over visual softness.

screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: Command center displaying top-ranked deals, recent AI scans, and category filters.

states.empty: Hawk illustration. 'No deals monitored yet. Start scanning.' with a primary CTA to Analyze.
states.error: Error icon + 'Failed to load feed. Check connection.' + Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky category filter chips at the top. Grid of deal cards below. Cards feature a large Barlow Condensed score, image thumbnail, and expected profit metric.

screens.name: AnalyzeForm
screens.purpose: Fast data-entry view to paste marketplace listing details and upload screenshots.

states.empty: N/A - Form is the default state.

screens.layout: Single column form. Floating labels or top-aligned labels. Sticky 'Analyze Deal' CTA pinned above the keyboard. Image upload uses a dashed border box.

screens.name: AnalysisResult
screens.purpose: The hero view displaying the AI deal score, risk evaluation, and suggested actions.

states.loading: Skeleton UI replicating the card shape, with pulse animation to simulate AI scanning the details.
states.error: 'Analysis failed. Try again.' with Retry button.

screens.layout: Full-screen modal or detailed view. Top hero section features a glowing score ring with large display font over the dark abstract background. Below: progressive reveal list of profit breakdown, red flags, and a copyable suggested negotiation message.

screens.name: DealBoard
screens.purpose: Kanban-style or grouped list tracking the status of saved deals.

states.empty: 'Board is empty. Find a deal to track.' + Add Deal CTA.

screens.layout: Segmented control at the top to filter by status (New, Watching, Messaged, Purchased, Sold, Skipped). Vertical list of compact deal cards displaying current status, image thumbnail, and profit margin.

hero_abstract_bg.alt: Black and orange abstract modern curves for hero score background

empty_hawk_mascot.alt: Close-up of a predatory hawk against a dark background

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First Utility (Personality 7) guidelines. Use deep obsidian (#0F0F13) for the primary surface and Ember/Orange (#EA580C) exclusively for the primary CTA, active tabs, and high-value accents. Do not introduce blue or purple.
Text contrast is critical. Use layered dark grays (surfaceSecondary #1C1C22 and surfaceTertiary #272730) to create depth instead of heavy shadows or glassmorphism.

Typography must drive the layout: use 'Barlow Condensed' for deal scores, metrics, prices, and timers to create a tactical, command-center feel. Use 'DM Sans' for body text and form labels to guarantee readability.

For the Analysis Result Card, use the 'hero_abstract_bg' image with a top-down gradient scrim (transparent to #0F0F13) so text remains readable. Incorporate an ambient glow for the AI score indicator.
The DealBoard must use segmented controls for statuses (New, Watching, Messaged, etc.) with a compact, vertically scrolling list of cards to ensure fast scanning.
Ensure 'Analyze Deal' and 'Save Deal' primary CTAs are sticky at the bottom of the screen (above the home indicator) on scrolling views.
Wire haptic feedback mapping to the defined events in the JSON. Specifically trigger heavy impacts when submitting a deal for analysis and a success notification when the score is revealed.
